misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 The debate about who the Final Villain will be is actually quite predictable from a narrative perspective. Blackbeard > Race for Pirate King title Imu > Final battle AFTER the One Piece is found Luffy will and must defeat Blackbeard beforehand. Imu arrives after the One Piece is found, explaining the final villian...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 For example this is why I think Nami felt the actual Abyss. Oda let us see when Imu left Pangea Castle with the гВігВігВі SFX, this sfx descended the Red Line as if it was transporting Imu, th
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 For example this is why I think Nami felt the actual Abyss. Oda let us see when Imu left Pangea Castle with the гВігВігВі SFX, this sfx descended the Red Line as if it was transporting Imu, then we see it cross where Gunko is and then descend through dark clouds. gi вШБпЄПрЯНКрЯЧЇпЄПрЯІ≠ (@NamiOrigins) #ONEPIECE1179 гВЇгВЇгВЇ is a vibration sfx, what she felt was definitely a disturbance in the air more than the weather changing. Nami's hearing and vision has been always insane, if this is any form of observtion haki, then it would mean she awakened it years ago, not now. вАФ https://nitter.net/NamiOrigins/status/2040502684852113621#m
